files.reason: Wait for live commit parity after Railway upload, then run the full ship check automatically.
Adds the live verification, deploy handoff, and real proof-call scripts used to prove the shipped path.
Always trigger post-call intelligence after call end so summaries are attempted on production calls.
files.excerpt:
diff --git a/server.ts b/server.ts
index 772b781..7d7a2da 100644
--- a/server.ts
+++ b/server.ts
@@ -7031,2 +7031,3 @@ app.get("/api/provisioning/requests", dashboardAuth, requireOperator, async (req
            CASE
+             WHEN pr.source LIKE '%smoke%' OR pr.owner_email LIKE 'smoke+%' THEN FALSE
              WHEN pr.status IN ('manual_fallback_required', 'pending', 'pending_auto_fulfillment') THEN TRUE
@@ -7036,2 +7037,3 @@ app.get("/api/provisioning/requests", dashboardAuth, requireOperator, async (req
            CASE
+             WHEN pr.source LIKE '%smoke%' OR pr.owner_email LIKE 'smoke+%' THEN 'Smoke test only; no operator action required.'
              WHEN pr.status = 'manual_fallback_required' THEN 'Contact buyer and finish activation manually.'
@@ -7043,2 +7045,3 @@ app.get("/api/provisioning/requests", dashboardAuth, requireOperator, async (req
            CASE
+             WHEN pr.source LIKE '%smoke%' OR pr.owner_email LIKE 'smoke+%' THEN FALSE
              WHEN pr.source LIKE 'stripe_%' OR pr.source LIKE '%checkout%' OR pr.requested_plan IN ('starter', 'pro', 'enterprise') THEN TRUE

files.reason: Tightens buyer activation/login flow so payment follows activation request and invite-based access is clearer.
